'''Clyngunn''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[ZeHethbra]] with mostly black fur covering him from head to toe, with the exception of a wide white stripe running from his nose, up over his head and down his back. He frequently wore tunics or [[Cloak/Legends|cloaks]] of blue and black, doffing them quickly if he got into a fight.

==Biography==
===Fame and boredom===
[[File:Clyngunn.jpg|thumb|left|150px|Clyngunn.]]
He was an ex-champion of the [[Stratis Games]] on his [[Homeworld/Legends|home]] [[Planet/Legends|planet]], having set the record for downing the most [[Sentience/Legends|sentient]] opponents in a single round in the Unarmed Combat category. With the [[Galactic Credit Standard/Legends|credits]] won from that, Clyngunn bought himself a star [[Yacht/Legends|yacht]] and toured a variety of resort planets, but he soon found the life of a sports-star, with its never-ending parade of fans, to be boring, and he turned his back on that life.<ref name="TTS" />

===The smuggler's life===
Traveling to the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim]], Clyngunn met the aging [[Smuggler/Legends|smuggler]] [[Billey]], himself something of a legend amongst his fellows. It was through Billey that Clyngunn finally found something that offered the thrills and excitement the ZeHethbra was looking for: the life of a smuggler. Trading his yacht for a [[Freighter/Legends|freighter]], Clyngunn set about customizing it for speed, cargo concealment, and most importantly, combat readiness. He smuggled [[Spice/Legends|spice]] and [[Blaster/Legends|guns]]. At one point, he was stopped by [[Imperial Office of Customs/Legends|Imperial Customs]] forces, but was released due to his sports fame.<ref name="TTS" />

Primarily due to the fact that he preferred to work alone, Clyngunn did well for himself. Clyngunn didn't really like most other smugglers, as shown in his interview with the [[Imperial Security Bureau/Legends|Imperial Security Bureau]] regarding [[BoShek/Legends|BoShek]]. However, events in [[The galaxy/Legends|the galaxy]] were happening that would make it difficult for a lone smuggler to earn his keep.

===New era, new alliances===
[[File:Clygunn_TLC.jpg|thumb|right|150px|Clyngunn meets with [[Talon Karrde]].]]

With the collapse of the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Empire]] and the subsequent chaos surrounding the ex-Imperial [[General/Legends|generals]] and [[Warlord/Legends|warlords]] fighting over the remnants, as well as penalties for smuggling growing stiffer, it became difficult for a smuggler to make a living. Clyngunn joined [[Talon Karrde]]'s [[Smugglers' Alliance]] to fight against [[Grand Admiral/Legends|Grand Admiral]] [[Mitth'raw'nuruodo/Legends|Thrawn]]. He did ensure to get Karrde's personal guarantee that he wouldn't be expected to change his attitude towards working on his own.
